sub_modules.15-OEE-a: Permissions enum + read-only consumer surface + reference tables (shift_configs, oee_alert_thresholds, shift_patterns, org_non_production_days) + Nakajima Big Loss taxonomy + role-permission seed
sub_modules.15-OEE-b: Materialized views (oee_shift_metrics, oee_daily_summary) + shift_aggregator_v1 DSL rule + apps/worker 15-min refresh job
sub_modules.15-OEE-c: API/Server endpoints (line trend, heatmap, summary, export) + oee_outbox_events table + 5-event publisher dispatcher
sub_modules.15-OEE-d: P1 UI dashboards: OEE-001 line trend, OEE-002 heatmap, OEE-003 summary + 3 tabs + A/P/Q drilldowns + P1 modal suite
sub_modules.15-OEE-e: Admin UIs: OEE-ADM-001 settings + OEE-ADM-002 shift-configs viewer + OEE-ADM-003 shift patterns + non-production calendar
sub_modules.15-OEE-f: P2 stubs scaffold (tables + rules active=FALSE + placeholders) + cross-module integration test + Playwright E2E

00-foundation: GDPR erase orchestrator (Wave1 T-113/T-114) — operator attribution scope only
e-sign primitive (Wave1 T-124) — not used by P1 OEE; reserved for P2 anomaly ack workflows
02-settings: rule_definitions registry (02-Settings §7.8) — shift_aggregator_v1 + P2 anomaly + maintenance trigger rules
reference_tables_registry — shift_configs, oee_alert_thresholds, big_loss_categories surfaced as read-only viewer rows
feature_flags — oee.anomaly_detection_enabled, oee.equipment_health_enabled, oee.tv_dashboard_enabled, oee.compare_weeks_diff_enabled, oee.export.xlsx_enabled, quality.module_enabled
role→permission mapping table — seeded for oee_viewer/oee_supervisor/oee_admin (T-005)
03-technical: (P2) products/items reference data for per-product OEE drill-down — out of P1 scope
08-production: oee_snapshots — PRIMARY producer (D-OEE-1); 15-OEE is read-only consumer (T-002 adds site_id col)
downtime_events — read-only consumer for Top Downtime Causes (OEE-001), Six Big Losses tab (OEE-003.T2), Pareto drilldown (P2)
changeover_events — read-only consumer for OEE-001 markers + OEE-003.T3 Changeover Analysis tab
09-quality: (P1 cross-link only) /quality/holds Alert from OEE-001c Quality drilldown, gated by quality.module_enabled feature flag
(P2) reject_kg / reject_units reads from production_output_events for Quality factor
12-reporting: report_access_gate_v1 — reused for V-OEE-ACCESS-2 (V-OEE has no parallel access logic)
report_exports — 15-OEE export action writes audit rows (source='15-oee')
enqueueExportJob — 12-REPORTING export engine reused by OEE-M-002 (T-013)
outbox consumer for cache-invalidate of OEE-dependent dashboards (T-010 dispatches oee.shift.aggregated + oee.daily.refreshed + oee.shift_pattern.changed)
13-maintenance: MTBF/MTTR feed: 13-MAINTENANCE consumes oee.shift.aggregated outbox event for D-MNT-3 MTBF/MTTR producer; oee_shift_metrics exposes mttr_min/mtbf_min stub columns
Equipment Health page (OEE-P2-B) reads 13-MAINTENANCE equipment_health table when oee.equipment_health_enabled=true
(P2) oee_maintenance_trigger_v1 rule fires on consecutive-day low-availability → emits oee.maintenance.triggered → 13-MAINTENANCE auto-MWO creator
14-multi-site: sites + site_user_access — REC-L1 site_id column on oee_snapshots (T-002) + reference tables (T-003/T-004) + RLS site filter via user_sites (V-OEE-ACCESS-4)

12-reporting: Reporting dashboards consume oee_shift_metrics + oee_daily_summary MVs as data source for OEE-derived KPI tiles; cache invalidation driven by 15-OEE outbox events

auditor_a_slices_addressed.OEE-001: T-002 (oee_snapshots site_id extension + read-only consumer indexes)
auditor_a_slices_addressed.OEE-003: T-008 (shift_aggregator_v1 registry+handler) + T-023 (P2 anomaly + maintenance trigger stubs registered active=FALSE)
auditor_a_slices_addressed.OEE-005: T-018 (Six Big Losses tab — P1 interim Pareto home per §15.5)

p0_blockers: T-001 (oee.*.* permission enum delta) — labels include p0-blocker, priority 90; gates Server Action RBAC strings across T-011..T-022
